memoryArtifacts.description: Greystoke was the son of Robert fitz Ralph, the second son of Ralph Fitzwilliam. William, Robert's elder brother, predeceased their father, and Robert succeeded as Ralph Fitzwilliam's heir, when Fitz …

Knight, Baron of Greystoke, Cumberland. Son and heir of Robert FitzRalph, 2nd Lord FitzWilliam, Baron of Greystoke by Elizabeth de Neville.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Greystoke於1299年8月15日出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Robert FitzRalph23歲，母親Elizabeth Neville13歲。他於1317年11月25日與Alice de Audley在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯特拉頓 奧德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1323年7月22日在英國達勒姆蓋黑阿德享年23歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Greystoke于1299年8月15日出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Robert FitzRalph23岁，母亲Elizabeth Neville13岁。他于1317年11月25日与Alice de Audley在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯特拉頓 奧德利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1323年7月22日在英国達勒姆蓋黑阿德享年23岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Greystoke was born on 15 August 1299, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert FitzRalph, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Neville, was 13. He married Alice de Audley on 25 November 1317, in Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 22 July 1323, in Gateshead, Durham, England, at the age of 23, and was buried in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Greystoke est né le 15 août 1299, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert FitzRalph, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Neville, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Audley le 25 novembre 1317, à Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1323, à Gateshead, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterré à Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Greystoke am 15. August 1299 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRalph 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Neville 13. Er hat am 25. November 1317 in Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alice de Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 22. Juli 1323 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Gateshead, Durham, England und wurde in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Greystoke è nato il il 15 agosto 1299 nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert FitzRalph, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Neville, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Audley il 25 novembre 1317, nel Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 22 luglio 1323, nel Gateshead, Durham, England, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolto a Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Greystokeが1299年8月15日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRalphは23歳，母Elizabeth Nevilleは13歳であった。1317年11月25日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストラットオン アウドリーでAlice de Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1323年7月22日にイギリスダルハムガテシェアドで23歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Greystoke(이)가 1299년 8월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRalph(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Neville(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1317년 11월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스트래턴 오들리에서 Alice de Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1323년 7월 22일 영국 뒤람 게이츠헤드에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Greystoke nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1299, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert FitzRalph, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Neville, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Audley em 25 de novembro de 1317, em Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1323, em Gateshead, Durham, Inglaterra, com 23 anos, e foi sepultado em Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ro.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Greystoke родился 15 августа 1299 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert FitzRalph было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Neville, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Audley 25 ноября 1317 г. в местности страттон аудли, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 22 июля 1323 г. в местности гэитешид, дурам, Англия в возрасте 23 лет и был похоронен в местности нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия.

Se casó con Alice de Audley el 25 de noviembre de 1317, en Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 22 de julio de 1323, en Gateshead, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultado en Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
